items.name: Nyan Cat Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring the chaotic fun of Meme Simulator Returns right to your shoulder! The NyanCat Shoulder Pet features a tiny floating companion based on one of the characters from the game, always hovering by your side and spreading meme energy wherever you go. Perfect for players who want a cute, vibrant, and iconic partner during their adventures. Let this colorful mini-NyanCat follow you through every map, every roleplay moment, and every meme-filled journey!

Tags:
nyancat, meme, memesimulator, shoulderpet, pet, floatingcompanion, cute, colorful, gamerstyle, robloxaccessory, avataritem, aesthetic, shoulderbuddy, fun, vibrant, collectible, memesimulatorreturns, kitty, rainbowcat

items.name: Plushie Monster Bundle
items.description:
the goofy plush monster who escaped the toy shelf! This full character bundle comes with everything you need to transform into a squishy, stitched-up creature with big eyes and an even bigger personality.

Whether you love cute, funny, or weird avatars, this plushy pal is perfect for your playful side. Cozy Chomp fits right in with cozy core, monster, and toy-style outfits a must-have for collectors and silly souls alike.

Includes: head, torso, arms, legs fully compatible with layered clothing and emotes.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#monster #plush #cute #buddy #ugc #avatar #core #creature #Outfit  |
